/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestPublicHeaderAuth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestArchiveReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestArchiveReaderDurability.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestArchiveWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestMetadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestPathSanitizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestRecordFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestRecordPayloadCap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestSafeOutputTree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_archive_gtests.dir/archive/TestMalformedRecords.cpp.o -o bseal_archive_gtests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/igellai/miniconda3/lib ../libbseal_core.a /home/igellai/miniconda3/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.11.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../libblake3_static.a ../libargon2_static.a /home/igellai/miniconda3/lib/libgtest.so.1.11.0
